title: Can't find instance insertion point (Internal Error: V3LinkDot.cpp:1237)

features.name: nested generate loops with module instantiation
features.description: Code should include nested generate loops (one generate block containing another) with a module instantiation inside the inner generate block

features.name: parameterized module with localparam instantiating another parameterized module
features.description: Code should include a parameterized module with a localparam that instantiates another parameterized module, where the outer module is instantiated inside a nested generate loop
